detail.text: Loom substrate adopted manually after bin/draft plan created the project dir; bin/loom project scaffold refuses on existing dirs. Follow-up: add a bin/loom project adopt-from-draft verb.

PLAN.md revised to v3 after user clarified loom+draft are paired (not alternatives). Promoted substrate coexistence gaps from open-questions to Phase 1 scope; added auto-loom-adopt to bin/draft plan; renumbered loop migration to Phase 2 and sunset to Phase 3.
